creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Arrigo Marchiori <ardovm@yahoo.it> writes:

> I am quite confused... I cannot reboot my PC now, but do you think
> it's worth trying?
>
> Maybe something was mis-configured from the past, and running
> xdg-screensaver from csh fixed it?

Hmm, this is weird :-)

It would be good to try rebooting, yes, so that we can verify whether
the problem comes back or not. If it does, please run xdg-screensaver
with `bash -x' for us to get more information on where it is
failing. Otherwise, I guess we can close this one as 'weird but cannot
reproduce anymore'.
